name: finledger-monolith
description: Production-ready monolith for the FinLedger analytics dashboard

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build:client: npm run build --prefix client && mkdir -p server/public && rm -rf server/public/* && cp -r client/dist/* server/public/
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:client

author: ayushgilhotra
